# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeFunction } from '@vercel/functions';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const handler: EdgeFunction = async (req) => {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    const { content, headers: userHeaders } = await req.json();

    if (typeof content !== 'string' && !(content instanceof ArrayBuffer)) {
      return new Response('Invalid content type. Must be a string or ArrayBuffer.', { status: 400 });
    }

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        if (typeof content === 'string') {
          controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(content));
        } else if (content instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
          controller.enqueue(new Uint8Array(content));
        }
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    const responseHeaders = new Headers(userHeaders || {});
    if (!responseHeaders.has('Content-Type')) {
        responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', 'application/octet-stream');
    }
    responseHeaders.set('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
    responseHeaders.set('Connection', 'keep-alive');

    return new Response(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error processing request:', error);
    return new Response('Internal Server Error', { status: 500 });
  }
};

export default handler;
